zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton於大約1348年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾吉可林頓時，他的父親Richard le Scrope 1st Baron Scrope of Bolton23歲，母親Blanche de la Pole23歲。他於1381年11月27日與Margaret Tibetot在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1403年12月3日在英國越可爾博爾頓享年56歲，埋葬在英國越可爾易亞斯比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton于大约1348年出生在英国英格兰越可爾吉可林頓时，他的父亲Richard le Scrope 1st Baron Scrope of Bolton23岁，母亲Blanche de la Pole23岁。他于1381年11月27日与Margaret Tibetot在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1403年12月3日在英国越可爾博爾頓享年56岁，埋葬在英国越可爾易亞斯比。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton was born about 1348, in Kirklington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard le Scrope 1st Baron Scrope of Bolton, was 23 and his mother, Blanche de la Pole, was 23. He married Margaret Tibetot on 27 November 1381, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 3 December 1403, in Bolton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Easby, Yorkshire, England.

fr.Bolton Castle,York,England: Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton est né environ 1348, à Kirklington, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard le Scrope 1st Baron Scrope of Bolton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Blanche de la Pole, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Tibetot le 27 novembre 1381, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 décembre 1403, à Bolton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Easby, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Bolton Castle,York,England: Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton um 1348 in Kirklington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard le Scrope 1st Baron Scrope of Bolton 23 und seine Mutter Blanche de la Pole 23. Er hat am 27. November 1381 in London, England Margaret Tibetot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Dezember 1403 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Bolton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Easby, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton è nato il circa 1348 nel Kirklington, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard le Scrope 1st Baron Scrope of Bolton, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Blanche de la Pole, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Tibetot il 27 novembre 1381, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 dicembre 1403, nel Bolton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Easby, Yorkshire, England.

ko.Bolton Castle,York,England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 볼턴 카스틀 쿠 레드미어
ko.lifeSummary: Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton(이)가 대략 1348년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 커크링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard le Scrope 1st Baron Scrope of Bolton(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Blanche de la Pole(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1381년 11월 27일 영국 런던에서 Margaret Tibetot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1403년 12월 3일 영국 요르크실르 볼턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 이스비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton nasceu aproximadamente 1348, em Kirklington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard le Scrope 1st Baron Scrope of Bolton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Blanche de la Pole, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Tibetot em 27 de novembro de 1381, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1403, em Bolton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Easby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Bolton Castle,York,England: болтон кастл кум редмир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton родился около 1348 г. в местности кирклингтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard le Scrope 1st Baron Scrope of Bolton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Blanche de la Pole, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Tibetot 27 ноября 1381 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 декабря 1403 г. в местности болтон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности эасби, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret Tibetot el 27 de noviembre de 1381, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1403, en Bolton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Easby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
